name: HNLMS Gouden Leeuw | Mommy Elf Supremacy
description:
I want mommy, I want milk, I want to be held, I want to be comforted...

Description: HNLMS Gouden Leeuw is a heavy cruiser and research shipgirl from the Kingdom of Tulipa, part of the Azur Lane faction.

Series: Azur Lane
